The People Behind R1SE

Meet our team.

We are survivors, advocates, clinicians, and community members united by one belief — that everyone deserves a chance to rise.

Leadership

Tarun Nandakumar

Co-founder

Director of Finance

Oversees R1SE's financial health, funding strategy, and resource allocation to maximize community impact.

Armaan Vaswani

Co-founder

Director of Research

Leads evidence-based program development and evaluates the effectiveness of R1SE's initiatives.

Krish Shah

Co-founder

Director of Outreach

Builds relationships with hospitals, clinics, and community organizations to expand R1SE's reach.

Aaron Mathew

Co-founder

Director of Technology

Drives R1SE's digital tools, website, and tech-driven solutions to connect people with help faster.
